title: Time tracking solutions comparison
excerpt:
Hi everyone! 
We are hosting a webinar on a very hot topic, ‘Time Tracking in monday’! 
We will cover 4 most-used time-tracking solutions: Tracket, 7pace, Clockwork and monday native option. 
You will about pros and cons…

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We are hosting a webinar on a very hot topic, ‘Time Tracking in monday’!

We will cover 4 most-used time-tracking solutions: Tracket, 7pace, Clockwork and monday native option.

You will about pros and cons, see demo of each and which solution is better for which use case.

Tue, 23rd April at 12pm AEST
RSVP here

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing Elena - this sounds useful for our community!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ElenaK - you should add TRS into the mix as well. That is one of our favorites

Sounds like a great topic!
Mark

posts.author: janknappe (Jan Knappe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Very interesting topic. We have been working on creating our own solution to extract time tracking data via the monday.com API. But it would be great to see what other solutions are out there.

Any chance there will be a recording available when I register? 12 pm AEST is unfortunately in the middle of the night for people in Europe…

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely! Please RSVP and we will send the recording.

posts.author: HStothard (Helen Stothard)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to view this recording as our current app isn’t reporting the info in a format we need and too much time is spent each month making manual adjustments to the data.
